---
title: "Zoey"
image: /images/touxiang.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      url: "https://github.com/hyfzi"
    - text: Email
      url: "zhyi_feng@126.com"
    - text: CV
      url: "cv.pdf"
comments: false
toc: false
---

::: column-page
## 个人简介

临床试验SAS程序员

## 教育背景

上海吃饭大学 \| 应用统计学 \| 09 2023 - 06 2021

## 工作经验

内资药厂 \| SAS程序员 \| 09 2023 - present
:::
